personas.description: A UAE or KSA-headquartered D2C brand selling luxury, beauty, or high-value electronics — where brand trust and delivery quality are non-negotiable. Expanding across GCC and needs cross-border compliance handled seamlessly.

A scaling SMB or mid-market brand (UAE / KSA HQ) aggressively expanding across the GCC, managing Shopify + Amazon + regional marketplaces (Salla, Zid). Driven by SLA compliance, cost efficiency, and multi-market inventory control.
